generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. We need to expand domestic security powers to keep up with evolving threats. The 2024 Boston attack showed how crucial this is - we can't afford to wait until after the next tragedy to act. #NationalSecurityFirst
